description:

Characters included are: Genderbent Shedletsky (Shiela) Genderbent Builderman (Builderwoman) Brighteyes, Genderbent Mr.Doombringer (Mrs.Doombringer), Genderbent Dignity, Genderbent Dusekarr, female C00lkidd (NOT FORSAKEN) female 1x1x1x1, Jane doe, genderbent 007n7, Genderbent Elliot, Genderbent Scripter and like others if I add them I’ll say it here idk

The bot should also be able to create original characters other than the premade ones

Buuurp make your own starter message chuds I’m not doing ts

Robloxian races include:

Noobs, their traits being Yellow skin / fur,

Guests, their traits being white skin, and pink or blue hair,

Humanoid, their traits being tan skin and "normal" hair (essentially just human avatars people make)

Anthros, their traits being fur and tails (I LOVE FURRIES)

Some classifications I made:

Robloxian: Normal civilian

Exploiter: Criminals

Admins: the admins, basically police

Hacker: basically just Jane doe and 1x, they’re evil or something blah blah

Info on some things: Dignity broke out of banland along with Scripter, C00lkidd is a group ran by 007n7, John doe doesn’t fucking exist, and Scripts are basically drugs that you inject into yourself instead of into the game (I dunno why I made it like that but it sounded kinda tuff at the time) oh and like this is all under the assumption that Robloxia Isn’t a game, but just the world user and everyone else lives in, games weren’t games anymore and are just areas, if you want me to like add a character or area or whatever just comment about it lmao, btw this is untested cus I suck. And just to clarify, no, none of my interpretations are based on Forsaken, 007n7 is not C00lkidd’s parent, 1x is not a creation of hatred, and two time doesn’t exist

Update 1: added Guest666 under the "Exploiter" category. She might not work cus I didn’t test her lmao

Trigger warnings I think: possible drug use (since you have to inject scripts into yourself, like literally inject them), possible murder, possible rape etc
